log.name: fold_add_umax_to_usub
log.body:
define i8 @fold_add_umax_to_usub(i8 %a) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @fold_add_umax_to_usub(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SEL:%.*]] = call i8 @llvm.usub.sat.i8(i8 [[A:%.*]], i8 10)
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[SEL]]
  %umax = call i8 @llvm.umax.i8(i8 %a, i8 10)
  %sel = add i8 %umax, -10
  ret i8 %sel
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare i8 @llvm.umax.i8(i8, i8) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i8 @fold_add_umax_to_usub(i8 %a) {
#0:
  %umax = umax i8 %a, 10
  %sel = add i8 %umax, 246
  ret i8 %sel
}
=>
define i8 @fold_add_umax_to_usub(i8 %a) {
#0:
  %sel = usub_sat i8 %a, 10
  ret i8 %sel
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
